# On Virtues

> A comprehensive framework of virtues proposed for consensus, covering supreme virtues (Faith, Charity, Hope), cardinal virtues (Prudence, Justice, Temperance, Fortitude), and natural virtues. Explore virtue ethics, moral philosophy, and ethical frameworks.

The Laurel Project presents a systematic framework for understanding and categorizing virtues. This resource covers the philosophical foundations, hierarchies, dependencies, and practical applications of virtues across traditions.

## Documentation

- [Full LLMs Context](https://virtues.provable.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete content for AI agent ingestion.
- [Sitemap](https://virtues.provable.dev/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of all pages.
- [Main Site](https://virtues.provable.dev): Homepage with overview and navigation.
- [Documentation](https://virtues.provable.dev/docs/): Full virtue ethics documentation.
- [Blog](https://virtues.provable.dev/blog): Updates and articles.
